articles.title: SEC Closes Ethereum Investigation, Affirms ETH as Commodity
articles.description: The SEC has officially closed its investigation into Ethereum, confirming that ETH sales are not securities transactions. This decision follows a letter from ConsenSys asking the SEC to affirm Ether’s status as a commodity after the May ETF approvals. ETHEREUM SURVIVES THE SEC.Today we’re happy to announce a major win for Ethereum developers, technology providers, …
